entity: Los Angeles Lakers franchise career points leader is Kobe Bryant (only Lakers team in his career, 1996-2016).
notes: Pins the Lakers PTS leader to Kobe Bryant. Warehouse reports 38,108 PTS (slightly higher than BBR-citable 33,643 — data-quality-audit.md documents agg_all_time_leaders inflation; fact_franchise_leaders appears to use the same inflated source). The person_id + leader_name match is the stable assertion.
